All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

L

length() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
how many options are currently held, note that if the pre-selection processing has happened this may include an abandon option
listDirectoryEntries(String, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory contents as directory entries subject to the controls.
listDirectoryEntries(Path, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean, String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory contents as directory entries subject to the controls.
listDirectoryEntries(Path, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory contents as directory entries subject to the controls.
listDirectoryEntriesAsString(String, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean, String, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls.
listDirectoryEntriesAsString(String, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, String, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls.
listDirectoryEntriesAsString(Path, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean, String, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls.
listDirectoryEntriesAsString(Path, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, String, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls.
listDirectoryNames(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates all entries in the specified directory strict alpha order with directories first.
listDirectoryNames(String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates all entries in the specified directory strict alpha order with directories first
listDirectoryNames(String, DirectoryListFilterType) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates specified (dir or file or both) entries in the specified directory strict alpha order with directories first if they are in the output.
listDirectoryNames(String, DirectoryListFilterType, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates specified (dir or file or both) entries in the specified directory strict alpha order with directories first if they are in the output
listDirectoryNames(String, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates the specified entries (dir, file, both) in the specified directory, returning in strict alpha order with the specified grouping (dir / file first or mixed).
listDirectoryNames(String, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates the specified entries (dir, file, both) in the specified directory, returning in strict alpha order with the specified grouping (dir / file first or mixed)
listDirectoryNames(String, DirectoryListOrderType) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates all entries in the specified directory in output in either dir first, file first or mixed, returned in strict alpha order by grouping.
listDirectoryNames(String, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates all entries in the specified directory in output in either dir first, file first or mixed, returned in strict alpha order by grouping
listDirectoryNames(Path) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates all entries in the specified directory strict alpha order with directories first.
listDirectoryNames(Path, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates all entries in the specified directory strict alpha order with directories first
listDirectoryNames(Path, DirectoryListFilterType) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates specified (dir or file or both) entries in the specified directory strict alpha order with directories first if they are in the output.
listDirectoryNames(Path, DirectoryListFilterType, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates specified (dir or file or both) entries in the specified directory strict alpha order with directories first if they are in the output
listDirectoryNames(Path, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Locates the specified entries (dir, file, both) in the specified directory, returning in strict alpha order with the specified grouping (dir / file first or mixed).

Locates the specified entries (dir, file, both) in the specified directory, returning in strict alpha order with the specified grouping (dir / file first or mixed)

Locates all entries in the specified directory in output in either dir first, file first or mixed, returned in strict alpha order by grouping.

locateChoiceDescriptionByOptionString(String) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Locate the choice description (if any) in the list buy comparing the supplied string to the option name specified when creating the choice descriptions.
locateChoiceDescriptionByParam(P) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Locate the choice description (if any) in the list buy comparing the supplied param to the param specified when creating the choice descriptions.
locateChoiceDescriptionIndexByChoiceDescription(ChoiceDescription<P>) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Locate the number of the choice description (if any) in the list, this used the equals method, so in principle if there are multiple descriptions that match only the first is returned.
locateChoiceDescriptionIndexByOptionString(String) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Locate the number of the choice description (if any) in the list buy comparing the supplied string to the option name specified when creating the choice descriptions.
locateChoiceDescriptionIndexByParam(P) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Locate the number of the choice description (if any) in the list buy comparing the supplied param to the param specified when creating the choice descriptions.
